title: Retraction/supersession screening gate (PubMed + Retraction Watch)
context: Cited literature must be screened for retraction/withdrawal so retracted findings are not silently asserted. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Build a screening gate that checks every cited PMID against PubMed retraction notices and the Retraction Watch dataset, flagging and withholding/annotating retracted sources.
acceptanceCriteria: Every cited PMID is screened against PubMed retraction notices + the Retraction Watch dataset.
Retracted/withdrawn sources are flagged and their assertions withheld or annotated.
output: Retraction-screening code + tests integrated into the pipeline, committed via PR.
